mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO xd_training_set ( session_id, user_id, tenant_id, equipment_code, device_code, set_no, reps, duration_sec, started_at, ended_at, create_by, create_time ) VALUES
( #{item.sessionId}, #{item.userId}, #{item.tenantId}, #{item.equipmentCode}, #{item.deviceCode}, #{item.setNo}, #{item.reps}, #{item.durationSec}, #{item.startedAt}, #{item.endedAt}, #{item.createBy}, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP )
